$description: Health OS Design System v2 tokens — the single source of truth. v1's warm multi-hue (apricot/rose/lavender) architecture + command-centre craft (radial glows, mono labels). Headings Spline Sans, body Anonymous Pro (mono). brand = Rose family. Flat, warm, premium, zero glass. Mirrored 1:1 into tokens.css (theme variables) and tailwind.preset.js (Tailwind classes) — if you change a value here, change it in both mirrors.

brand.$description: Alias of the Rose family — the signature hue. Use brand-* for action, rose-* when you mean the hue itself.

300.$description: accent-as-text on dark grounds (AA on carbon/black)

400.$description: Expressive Rose — brand DNA, accent fills with dark text, gradient stop. Never white text on this.

550.$description: the lightest rose that still passes AA with white text (~4.8:1) — 'not as dark as 600' primary fill; resting 550, hover 600

600.$description: primary action — buttons, links, active nav, focus rings; AA with white text

rose.$description: Same ramp as brand — the family name.

apricot.$description: Warm accent — the warm start of the signature gradient. 400 is the DNA value.

lavender.$description: Cool accent — the cool end of the signature gradient. 600 doubles as info.

ink.$description: Warm neutral text ramp. THEME-AWARE: these are the light/paper values; the ramp flips on .dark (see themes). Reference as Tailwind ink-* classes, which resolve via CSS variables in every theme.

500.$description: secondary text — the lightest AA body on paper (~4.6:1)

900.$description: Carbon — primary text. There is deliberately NO ink-800.

carbon.$description: Fixed dark — identical in every theme. Dark pill CTA, footer panel, dashboard rails.

paper.$description: Warm Ivory page ground. THEME-AWARE: light theme uses #FFFFFF, paper theme #F9F6F2, dark theme #000000 (the two extremes are sanctioned ONLY as theme grounds via CSS vars — never hard-code them).

accent-text.$description: Accent-as-text on the page ground. THEME-AWARE: brand-600 on light/paper, brand-300 on dark (AA on black). Tailwind: text-accent.

gold.$description: Premium signal only — upgrade / best-value moments, never a general accent.

700.$description: AA text on success-100 — the tint-pair text step

600.$description: danger action fill — AA with white text

theme.$description: Three global themes, applied as a class on <html> and implemented as RGB-channel CSS variables in tokens.css. Structural neutrals (paper/surface/surface-2/line/line-soft/ground-textured, the ink ramp, accent-text, the btn-accent-* quad) flip per theme; brand accents and carbon are fixed. Mode-aware accent button: light=apricot tonal, paper=rose tonal, dark=deep lavender well — all AA-verified pairs.

light.$description: Default (no class). Clean white ground, warm ink.

dark.$description: .dark — true-black OLED software ground (the sanctioned pure-black exception; cards lift to #161616). Neutral grey ink; accents do the colour work.

signature.$description: bg-brand-gradient — apricot → rose → lavender, never reversed. Logo, one hero word, primary marketing CTA, soft glows.

warm.$description: bg-brand-gradient-warm — apricot-led sunrise sibling; dark text only.

soft.$description: bg-brand-gradient-soft — pastel wash for large fills.

soft-dark.$description: bg-brand-gradient-soft-dark — deep 800s sibling for carbon grounds.

glow.$description: Soft radial background washes — atmosphere, never box-shadows, never behind body text. Default alpha 0.28; -strong (0.55) is for expressive opt-in surfaces only.

hero.value: radial-gradient(40% 50% at 22% 18%, rgba(245,160,96,0.30) 0%, transparent 70%), radial-gradient(42% 52% at 78% 14%, rgba(166,102,217,0.28) 0%, transparent 72%), radial-gradient(50% 55% at 50% 4%, rgba(232,91,168,0.26) 0%, transparent 68%)
hero.$description: bg-glow-hero — the composed three-glow hero wash

body.$description: body + labels (font-sans), monospace by design — the OS texture. Line-height 1.6, measure ≤ ~70ch. Ships 400/700 only — never font-medium/semibold on body.

micro.$description: smallest sanctioned size — dense meta inside mocks/swatches only, never body copy

space.$description: 8px base scale (Tailwind default utilities). space-1 (4px) is for fine optical nudges only.

heroSpace.$description: RULE — every hero uses this spacious, minimalist rhythm via the <Hero> primitive. Don't hand-roll hero padding.

py-lg.$description: hero top/bottom padding (≥ md) — md:pt-hero-py-lg / md:pb-hero-py-lg

gap.$description: primary gap between hero blocks (subcopy → action) — mt-hero-gap

gap-sm.$description: tighter gap (title → subcopy, action → chips) — mt-hero-gap-sm

radius.$description: The locked scale: 8px UI (md) · 12px cards (lg) · 20px bento/hero panels (xl) · 28px large panels (2xl) · 36px oversized/carbon footer (3xl) · full pills for marketing CTAs, badges, avatars. Product-UI buttons stay md; within one composition inner radii step one size tighter than their container.

md.$description: default UI — inputs, product buttons, command bar, feature-icon chips

full.$description: pills — marketing CTAs, the dark carbon pill, badges, avatars

shadow.$description: Neutral, carbon-based (rgba(31,31,31,…)) only — never coloured, never inner. Default is shadow-none + hairline; interactive surfaces lift to sm on hover; md+ is for genuinely floating UI.

motion.$description: Fade + small translate. Interactions 150–250ms, reveals 300–400ms, 480ms is the ceiling. No bounce/elastic/spring overshoot. Sanctioned exception: count-up numbers may run to 1.4s (they are data settling, not UI motion) and always snap under reduced motion.

xl.$description: the largest hero reveal — the ceiling (duration-xl)

count-up.$description: the count-up exception — CountUp/Counter/Stat only, ease-out, snaps under reduced motion

press.$description: the sanctioned press feedback — active:scale-[0.98] at duration-xs, system-wide

marquee.$description: animate-marquee — tool-card/logo carousel; -slow 60s, -reverse 40s. Pause on hover; static under reduced motion.

ticker.$description: animate-ticker — thin top label strip; 32–45s sanctioned band

shimmer.$description: animate-shimmer — skeleton-loading sheen ONLY, never decorative text shimmer

reading.$description: max-w-reading — with mono body keep actual lines ≤ ~70ch
